prompt:
## Task: Test booking widget on https://www.simlisalon.pl/#booking

Open the booking page and test the edge cases below using the browser. The salon is 'Anastazja' and is already pre-configured.

## Known test data (already set up in the salon):
- Service that requires equipment: 'Koloryzacja pełna' (120 min, requires 'Laser wojskowy')
- Employee schedule: Mon 09:00-17:00, Tue 09:00-17:00, Wed 09:00-11:30, Thu/Fri/Sat/Sun = off (Wolne)
- Exception/day off: 2026-03-19 (Thursday, reason: Urodziny mamy)

## Tests to run (open browser, navigate to https://www.simlisalon.pl/#booking for each):

**TC01 - Day off (exception)**
Select service: Koloryzacja pełna
Select date: 2026-03-19 (Thursday)
Expected: NO time slots available (employee has exception 'day off' on this date)
Document: what the UI shows

**TC02 - Non-working day (Thursday from weekly schedule)**
Select service: Koloryzacja pełna
Select date: 2026-03-26 (Thursday, no exception)
Expected: NO time slots (Thursday is 'Wolne' in weekly schedule)
Document: what the UI shows

**TC03 - Schedule ends at 11:30 on Wednesday**
Select service: Koloryzacja pełna (120 min)
Select date: 2026-03-18 (Wednesday, schedule 09:00-11:30)
Expected: Only slot 09:00 should be available (09:00 + 120min = 11:00, fits within 11:30). Slot 09:30 would end at 11:30 which is exactly closing - check if it appears. Slot 10:00 would end at 12:00 which exceeds 11:30 - should NOT appear.
Document: exact list of available slots shown

**TC04 - Equipment conflict blocks slot**
Select service: Koloryzacja pełna (requires Laser wojskowy)
Select date: 2026-03-16 (Monday)
Note the available slots.
Then try to book one slot (e.g. 10:00) - complete the booking.
Then go back and select the same service, same date.
Expected: the 10:00 slot (and overlapping slots for 120min service = 10:00 and 10:30) should NOT be available anymore because the equipment is now booked.
Document: before and after slot lists

**TC05 - Normal working day**
Select service: Koloryzacja pełna
Select date: 2026-03-17 (Tuesday, schedule 09:00-17:00)
Expected: Slots from 09:00 to 15:00 (last slot 15:00 + 120min = 17:00). Slot 15:30 should NOT appear (would end at 17:30).
Document: first and last available slots

## Report format for each TC:
- TC number and name
- URL used
- Steps taken
- Screenshot description (what you see)
- Expected vs Actual result
- PASS or FAIL

At the end: summary table and any bugs found.
